message:
perf: enable pipe mode for screencast, WebSocket for commands

- Enable --remote-debugging-pipe for high-bandwidth screencast data
- Fix pipe FD setup with proper dup2 and CLOEXEC handling
- Use pipe2() without O_CLOEXEC so FDs are inherited across exec
- Handle edge case where pipe FD already equals target (3 or 4)
- Keep WebSocket for mouse/keyboard commands (lower latency)
- Remove debug logging (mouse_mapper.log)
